market_context: Mixed tape: 'Chip Rout Drags Nasdaq 100 Lower, Oil Climbs' (07-07) followed Monday's Dow-above-53,000 optimism. VOO 686.79, +0.2% over 30d; 'SCHD ETF Is Beating VOO and QQQ This Year' (07-05) still argues breadth over mega-cap tech. Data pull PARTIAL for the 5th consecutive run: fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+news intact. Sector caps cannot be enforced, so any buy would be rejected sector-unknown; the parked JNJ re-entry stays parked with Q2 earnings imminent. Portfolio is 100% cash, so the holdings-only breaking-news web sweep was not applicable. Every ticker's headline list was non-empty today. No thesis-grade catalyst crossed the bar: all holds.

signals.thesis: Two-sided: Apple commits >$30B to Broadcom custom silicon and wireless (07-08) and tests China's CXMT memory chips (07-08), but the EU General Court upheld its DMA gatekeeper designation, dismissing Apple's actions (07-08). Price 310.69, +0.6% over 30d, mid-range. Falsified toward sell if DMA remedies hit Services revenue; toward buy if the silicon spend lifts margin guidance.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-08: Apple To Increase Spending To Over $30B On Broadcom Design And Production Of Custom Silicon Components
Benzinga 2026-07-08: EU General Court Dismisses All Of Apple's Actions, Upholds Its Gatekeeper Designation Under Digital Markets Act

signals.thesis: Alphabet replaces Verizon in the Dow (07-07) — symbolic, not fundamental. Enterprise push continues via Cognizant and Accenture Gemini deals (07-07), but Axios reports a Google AI chatbot security flaw (07-07). Price 366.99, -4.2% over 30d; no fundamentals this run to judge valuation. Falsified toward buy if Cloud guidance confirms SI traction; toward sell if the flaw dents enterprise adoption.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-07: EXCLUSIVE: Alphabet Replaces Verizon, Here's Who Market Expert Jay Woods Says Could Leave Dow Jones Next
Benzinga 2026-07-07: 'Researchers uncover Google AI chatbot security flaw' - Axios Exclusive

signals.thesis: FDA approved the dual-energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH SF catheter platform (07-08), extending June's catalyst streak; close 267.16, +14.0% over 30d, above the 240 falsification line. But Q2 earnings are imminent (07-06 preview) and fundamentals are missing a 5th straight run, so a buy would be rejected sector-unknown. Re-entry stays parked until a clean-data day after the Q2 print. Falsified if close < 240 or talc litigation escalates.

Falsified toward sell if a soft Azure print follows the layoffs; toward buy if the own-model swap lifts margin guidance.

signals.thesis: Ecosystem holding after Monday's DeepSeek chip scare: The Information reports Nvidia hedging by partnering with chip competitors (07-08) and Samsung began mass production of AI SSDs for Nvidia's Vera Rubin (07-08). Price 196.97, -8.5% over 30d, above the 189.82 30d low. Two-sided and unresolved; no position to protect. Re-evaluate if 190 breaks or Vera Rubin timelines slip.

signals.thesis: WSJ: Obamacare insurers seek big rate hikes again, premiums could jump 14% in 2027 on rising medical costs (07-08) — supportive of pricing power but confirms cost-trend pressure. Close 428.05, +10.2% over 30d, near the 430.10 range high. HSBC hold note is price-target chatter, ignored per policy. Falsified toward buy on a concrete cost-trend or guidance catalyst; toward sell if the managed-care rally retraces.
